03

Four-Day Outline

A clean Word document outline for quick sharing, printing or committee reference.

DAY 1 Thursday, 18 June — Travel · Arrival · Session 1

  • 12:30 PMGather at Kranji MRT, depart for Johor Bahru
  • 3:00 PMArrival & free-and-easy at Paradigm Mall
  • 5:00 PMCheck-in at Hyatt Place
  • 6:00 PMDinner at hotel
  • 7:30 PMSession 1 — Worship by Children ♪ Worship

DAY 2 Friday, 19 June — Starfish Leisure Farm · Worship & Camp Challenge

  • 7:30 AMBreakfast, then bus to Starfish Leisure Farm
  • 9:30 AMSession 2 — Worship by Fathers + Family Fun Time (FFT) ♪ Worship
  • 12:00 PMLunch at the farm (provided)
  • 2:00 PMOutward Bound — ATV
  • 4:30 PMWash-up, then return to Paradigm Mall
  • 6:15 PMDinner & evening fellowship (cell level)

DAY 3 Saturday, 20 June — Family Workout · Free Time · Debate Night

  • 7:30 AMBreakfast & morning devotion
  • 9:00 AMSession 3 — Worship by Youth + Family Workout ♪ Worship
  • 12:00 PMLunch — free & easy at Paradigm Mall (rest, cell time, shopping)
  • 6:00 PMDinner at hotel
  • 7:30 PMSession 4 — Worship by Mothers + Healthy Conversation ♪ Worship

DAY 4 Sunday, 21 June — Closing · Departure

  • 7:30 AMBreakfast & final packing
  • 9:00 AMClosing Session — Worship + Family, Cell Activities ♪ Worship
  • 10:30 AMCheck-out of Hyatt Place
  • 12:00 PMFree & easy / dismissal at Paradigm Mall
  • 4:00 PMDepart for Singapore
